sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_fuzz_bool (id Int64, is_active Bool) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_fuzz_bool VALUES (1, true), (2, false), (3, true);
UPDATE test_fuzz_bool SET is_active = false WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, is_active, toTypeName(is_active) AS type FROM test_fuzz_bool WHERE is_active = true;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_count FROM test_fuzz_bool WHERE is_active == 1;
